# "slot" Audit & Retirement Plan

**Generated by:** `node scripts/audit-slots.mjs` → `data/slot-audit.json`
**Why:** WB is Light-DOM composition. The shadow-DOM `<slot>` mechanism (`<slot>`, `slot="…"`, `data-slot`, `data.slot`) is being **retired**. This is the full inventory to burn it down.

## Headline

| Category | Count | What it is | Action |
|---|---:|---|---|
| `<slot>` element | **52** | shadow-DOM slot tags in view/registry templates | **remove** — replace with light-DOM children |
| `slot="…"` attribute | **38** | content marked for a named slot (demos/docs) | **remove** — plain child content |
| JS `.slot` / `data.slot` / `slotContent` | **9** | the machinery that reads/injects slots | **retire** the code path |
| `[slot]` / `[slot=]` selector | 3 | queries for slotted content | remove with the machinery |
| `data-slot` | 2 | legacy slot marker | remove |
| prose / comment / other | 140 | docs & comments mentioning slots | update after the code is gone |
| **Total** | **244** | across 48 files | |

The **~104 functional** uses (52 + 38 + 9 + 3 + 2) are the real work; the 140 prose lines follow.

## Where the machinery lives (retire first)

1. **`src/core/mvvm/schema-builder.js`** (24) — the `$view`/`data.slot` engine. Contains the `if (schema.$view.length === 0 && data.slot)` "restore slot" branch (this is the code I mistakenly cited for the #202 card fix — it depends on the slot mechanism you're retiring). **This is the core to rework.**
2. **`src/core/wb-views.js`** (19) — the views system that processes `<slot>` in templates.
3. **`src/wb-viewmodels/card.js`** (23) — `cardhero` uses `slot="pretitle"/"title"/"subtitle"` + `data-slot`. Convert to reading light-DOM children.
4. **`src/wb-views/views-registry.json`** (16) + `src/wb-models/*.schema.json` (cardhorizontal/cardimage/cardoverlay have `<slot>`) — template definitions with `<slot>`.

## View templates & demos (remove `<slot>` / `slot=`)

- `demos/wb-views-demo.html` (21, incl. 15 `<slot>`), `demos/wb-views-demo.md` (4), `demos/charity-food.html` (4), `demos/kitchen-sink.html` (3), `demos/layout-test.html` (2).

## Docs (update prose after)

- `ATTRIBUTE-NAMING-STANDARD.md` (20), `WBVIEWS.md` (9), `wb-parts-spec.md` (7), `MVVM-MIGRATION*.md` (12), `docs/behaviors/wb-card.md` (7), `docs/components/cards/cardhero.md` (5), …

## Recommendations

1. **Decide the replacement pattern** (Light-DOM composition): named regions become plain child elements the behavior reads directly (e.g. cardhero reads its `<h1>`/first heading as the title instead of `slot="title"`).
2. **Retire the machinery** in `schema-builder.js` + `wb-views.js` first — this also removes the `$view`/slot coupling behind the #202 card double-render (card.js should be the sole renderer; the schema should carry properties/validation, not a slot-based `$view`).
3. **Convert templates** (`views-registry.json`, `*.schema.json`, view demos) — drop `<slot>`.
4. **Convert demos** — `slot="…"` → plain children.
5. **Gate it:** add a compliance test (`no-slots`) using `audit-slots.mjs` that fails on any `<slot>` / `slot=` / `data-slot` in `src/` + `demos/` once converted; ratchet so no new slots creep in.
6. **Update docs** last.

Re-run `node scripts/audit-slots.mjs` after each pass to watch the count fall.
